import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def dft_manual(x):
    N = len(x)
    n = np.arange(N)
    k = n.reshape((N, 1))
    e = np.exp(-2j * np.pi * k * n / N)
    X = np.dot(e, x)
    return X

def fft_recursive(x):
    N = len(x)
    if N <= 1:
        return x
    
    even = fft_recursive(x[0::2])
    odd = fft_recursive(x[1::2])
    
    T = [np.exp(-2j * np.pi * k / N) * odd[k] for k in range(N // 2)]
    
    return np.concatenate([even + T, even - T])

sampling_rate = 1000
duration = 1       
t = np.linspace(0, duration, int(sampling_rate * duration), endpoint=False)

frequency1 = 50   
frequency2 = 120  
signal = 0.7 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * frequency1 * t) + 1.0 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * frequency2 * t) + 0.1 * np.random.randn(len(t))

# dft_manual(signal)  # Genellikle çok yavaş olduğu için varsayılan olarak çalıştırılmaz.

N_original = len(signal)
N_fft_padded = 1
while N_fft_padded < N_original:
    N_fft_padded *= 2

padded_signal = np.pad(signal, (0, N_fft_padded - N_original), 'constant')

fft_rec_output = fft_recursive(padded_signal)

numpy_fft_output = np.fft.fft(signal)

xf_original = np.fft.fftfreq(N_original, 1 / sampling_rate)
xf_padded = np.fft.fftfreq(N_fft_padded, 1 / sampling_rate)


plt.figure(figsize=(12, 9))

plt.subplot(3, 1, 1)
plt.plot(t, signal)
plt.title('Zaman Alanında Sinyal')
plt.xlabel('Zaman (s)')
plt.ylabel('Genlik')
plt.grid(True)

plt.subplot(3, 1, 2)
plt.plot(xf_padded, np.abs(fft_rec_output))
plt.title('FFT (Rekürsif Uygulama) Frekans Spektrumu (Dolgulu Sinyal)')
plt.xlabel('Frekans (Hz)')
plt.ylabel('Genlik')
plt.xlim(0, sampling_rate / 2)
plt.grid(True)

plt.subplot(3, 1, 3)
plt.plot(xf_original, np.abs(numpy_fft_output))
plt.title('NumPy FFT Frekans Spektrumu (Orijinal Sinyal)')
plt.xlabel('Frekans (Hz)')
plt.ylabel('Genlik')
plt.xlim(0, sampling_rate / 2)
plt.grid(True)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
